newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Recent disclosures (Jan: $15.2M Texas Round Rock grant + ~$223M expansion to 12nm; EUV capacity in Dresden/Tokyo; IBM 2nm/High-NA JDA) all predate June 9. The +19% move came on no fresh fundamental news.

sources.label: Texas grant for Tekscend Photomask expansion (FinancialContent)
Tekscend Photomask stock analysis (Simply Wall St)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the test-time-scaling lens, photomask/reticle capacity is a real infrastructure choke-point for advanced-node ramps, and rank 3 reflects that. No new fundamental evidence since June 9 (expansion/IBM JDA pre-dated it); +19% was news-free flow. Hold at rank 3.
verdicts.bull: Photomask bottleneck for 2nm/High-NA; Texas+Dresden+Tokyo EUV expansion; IBM JDA.
verdicts.neutral: Spun-off Toppan unit; small float; expansion story already known.
verdicts.bear: $2.8B cap, thin liquidity; +43% YTD with no new catalyst; capex execution risk.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: EUV/High-NA photomask capacity ramp for 2nm logic.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Capex execution and node-transition timing; small-cap volatility.
